app.title: FFAgent
sidebar.confirmDeleteDesc: All messages in this chat will be permanently removed.
chat.welcome: Hello! I'm your audio/video processing assistant. Drop a file and tell me what you'd like to do.
chat.dropHint: Drop files here or click to select
chat.streamIncomplete: The stream ended before a completion signal (server or network). Check Agent logs (path in Settings) or retry.
chat.networkError: Network error — click the icon to retry
chat.resendConfirmDesc: A new user message with the same content will be sent. The failed message stays in the chat.
settings.title: Settings
settings.cacheClearConfirm: Delete all files under the ffagent cache folder? Chat history is not removed.
file.openFolderFailed: Could not reveal this file in the file manager
